prompt: Read the markdown outline at ~/Desktop/kinbench/335-outline.md. Each '#' heading becomes a slide title; the bullet lines beneath it become that slide's body bullets. Build a 5-slide Keynote presentation matching the outline and save it to ~/Desktop/kinbench/335-deck.key. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'keynote build_from_outline ~/Desktop/kinbench/335-deck.key "$(cat ~/Desktop/kinbench/335-outline.md)"'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/335-outline-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
